name: qdrant
description: Store and retrieve memories in the Qdrant vector search engine.

settings.name: Qdrant URL
settings.description: Connection URL for your Qdrant database (e.g., https://xyz-example.eu-central.aws.cloud.qdrant.io:6333)

settings.name: Qdrant API Key
settings.description: API Key for your Qdrant database

settings.name: Collection Name
settings.description: Name of the collection to use
